summary: Comprehensive Riverbend demo walkthrough audit (admin + staff). All 17 top-level pages load without 5xx at the browser layer. Scheduling calendar renders correctly with human-readable patient/provider names (no useEffect crash). 8/8 personas load and tabs render. HOWEVER, 5 material bugs were surfaced: (P0) raw tenant/location UUID leaks into the 'Preferred location' field on EVERY patient Overview, (P0) Claims Queue returns 401 for admin and 403 for staff, so the entire claim-detail / scrubber / denial-reason / follow-up-flag branch of the audit could not be exercised and the UI silently falls back to a misleading 'No claims yet' empty state, (P0) /api/billing/patients/{id}/statements returns 500 for Jaxon Morgan and Aria Johnson, (P1) raw internal tag 'demo_seed' is printed verbatim below intake forms for Derrick/Isabella/Jaxon/Hannah/Marcus, (P1) the appointment workflow panel is missing the required 'Check in' button and 'Room selector' (only Launch encounter / Reschedule / Save / Close / Open intake render).

critical.issue: Returns 401 for admin@ccms.app (Ava Bennett, role=admin) and 403 for staff@ccms.app. Frontend swallows the error and renders 'No claims yet. Create one from a patient’s encounter to get started.' This blocks the entire claim-detail / Run-Scrubber / denial-reason / follow-up-flag portion of the audit (Stone WC denial, Cho PIP partial-pay, Morgan rejected-subscriber-mismatch, Johnson paid, Parker self-pay, etc.). Worked in iter 64 per prior reports — likely a regression in the billing/claims queue authz layer or a missing reauth-scope requirement that the frontend is not satisfying.

Returns 500 for Jaxon Morgan (47b65ff4-f15c-449b-955c-fc816de6524e) and Aria Johnson (473165a5-61d6-4df1-98ce-53969ec880ac) when opening their Billing & Ledger tab. Other personas are fine. Likely an unseeded/None-typed field for pediatric-guarantor or a specific Aria claim row; backend stack-trace needed.

minor.issue: backend.err.log still noisy with 'invalidate_prefix(patients:) failed: Error 111 connecting to 127.0.0.1:6379' (carried over from iter 66, non-blocking).

ui_bugs.issue: Raw UUID '775775d1-7955-4553-b506-2bc89f877e1f' is rendered verbatim instead of the location/clinic name. Reproduces on ALL 8 personas (Derrick, Isabella, Ethan, Jaxon, Claire, Hannah, Marcus, Aria). DOM path: div.mt-1.text-sm.text-foreground inside the 'PREFERRED LOCATION' grid cell. Expected value: location display_name (probably 'Riverbend Chiropractic & Wellness' main location).

Raw internal provenance tag 'demo_seed' is printed below every intake form as plain text (last

). Visible for Derrick, Isabella, Jaxon, Hannah, Marcus. Should either be suppressed in UI or shown only in a dev/debug mode.

When claims/queue endpoint fails with 401/403, the UI shows the misleading 'No claims yet. Create one from a patient’s encounter to get started.' empty state instead of surfacing the permission error or correlation id. Stats show 0 / 0 / 0 / $0.00 which is factually wrong (demo has 11 claims seeded).

Clicking an appointment opens a 'Reschedule appointment' modal that exposes Launch encounter, Save changes, Close and 'Open intake' — but the required 'Check in' button and a 'Room selector' control are absent. Per the review request all four (Check in / Launch encounter / Reschedule / Room) must render.

integration_issues.flow: Claims queue → claim detail → Run Scrubber
integration_issues.issue: Not reachable — queue is empty for both admin and staff due to backend 401/403. Unable to verify: (a) provider/facility/assignee render as human names, (b) CPT/modifier/dx rendering, (c) 'Run Scrubber: 0 errors / 0 warnings' on payable claims, (d) intentional-teaching warnings on the 3 denial claims, (e) Stone-WC denied claim shows denial reason + follow-up flag, (f) Cho PIP partial-paid $80/$65 breakdown, (g) Morgan PacificCare rejected (subscriber mismatch), (h) Claire Morgan paid 95d ago. ALL of these audit items are currently blocked.
Statements API 500 leaves the Billing & Ledger tab partially populated / erroring for these two personas.

issues: Masked initials 'C. M.', 'D. S.' etc shown by default is correct HIPAA behaviour, but the 'PATIENT PROFILE · MASKED' badge could be more visible; admins may not realise they need to click 'Unmask (audited)' to get full name.

action_items: P0 — Fix /api/billing/claims/queue 401 for admin (and decide whether 403 for staff is intentional RBAC). This is the single biggest blocker; it re-opens the entire downstream audit (scrubber, denial reasons, follow-up flags, Stone-WC / Cho-PIP / Morgan-pediatric / Johnson / Parker / Claire closed episode).

P0 — Resolve raw UUID in PREFERRED LOCATION field on PatientOverview. Resolve the location_id → location.display_name (Riverbend Chiropractic & Wellness or the seeded clinic location) before rendering. Same fix pattern likely exists on other patient profile fields — grep for any remaining *_id consumed directly in JSX without a resolver.
P0 — Fix /api/billing/patients/{id}/statements 500 for Jaxon Morgan and Aria Johnson. Likely an unset guarantor/charge field. Grab the server correlation id from backend.err.log around the 5xx.
P1 — Suppress (or gate behind debug) the 'demo_seed' provenance tag on the IntakeForm card — it is leaking an internal seed marker into user-facing output on 5 personas.
P1 — Add missing 'Check in' and 'Room selector' controls to the appointment workflow panel (per the acceptance criteria).
P1 — When claims/queue returns 401/403, show a permission / error state (with correlation id) instead of the misleading 'No claims yet' empty state.
critical_code_review_comments: PatientOverview 'PREFERRED LOCATION' field renders location_id unresolved — either the backend should hydrate the display name or the frontend should look it up via the tenancy/locations map it already fetches.
IntakeTab trusts whatever is in intake.notes|source|provenance and prints it verbatim — need a 'developer-only' guard or a server-side strip for demo_seed-style markers.

Claims queue swallows non-200 responses into the generic empty-state branch. Recommend: if queue.status in (401,403,5xx) → render an <ErrorState correlationId=…/> with a link to open a ticket, never the 'No claims yet' copy.
Appointment workflow panel still diverges from the spec (missing Check in + Room). Consider a single source of truth for the action row derived from appointment.status.

success_rate.backend: ~80% (top-level pages load, claims queue 401 + statements 500 are the failures)
success_rate.frontend: ~70% (scheduling calendar + persona profiles render, but UUID + demo_seed leakage and missing workflow-panel controls are visible on every relevant screen)

test_credentials: admin@ccms.app / Admin@ComplianceClinic1 (no MFA, hit reauth PIN prompt on claims queue but that does not fix the 401 — after dismissing, the endpoint still 401s). staff@ccms.app / Staff@ComplianceClinic1 (returns 403 on claims/queue).
context_for_next_testing_agent: The single most impactful retest is /api/billing/claims/queue as admin — once it returns 200 and the queue populates, the full claim-detail / scrubber / denial-reason / follow-up-flag audit (Stone WC denied 'missing case number', Cho PIP partially-paid $80/$65 split, Morgan PacificCare subscriber-mismatch rejection, Johnson paid, Claire paid 95d ago) can finally be exercised. Second-most-impactful is the PatientOverview 'PREFERRED LOCATION' UUID leak — it affects ALL 8 personas (Derrick, Isabella, Ethan, Jaxon, Claire, Hannah, Marcus, Aria) and is the canonical example of raw-ID leakage the review request is specifically asking to eliminate. /api/billing/patients/{id}/statements 500 is deterministic for Jaxon Morgan and Aria Johnson (not other personas). Appointment workflow-panel selectors: clicking an appointment opens a [role='dialog'] labelled 'Reschedule appointment' — verify presence of buttons 'Check in' and a room <select> inside it.

rca of the issue.preferred_location_uuid_leak: Single-line fix on the client: in PatientOverview.jsx the field reads patient.preferred_location_id directly. Either (a) swap to patient.preferred_location?.display_name, or (b) hydrate via the tenancy/locations list already loaded for the app sidebar.
rca of the issue.claims_queue_401: All other endpoints (auth/me, authz/me/permissions, patients, scheduling, settings, reports) return 200 for admin. Only /api/billing/claims/queue is 401. Likely added a new permission check (e.g., billing:claims.read) that is not granted to the admin role seed or is gated by a reauth-scope the admin session never obtained. Compare to iter 64 report where claims queue was populated.
rca of the issue.statements_500: Only Jaxon and Aria 500 — both have pediatric-guarantor / special-payer rows. Likely None-dereference in a template / amount formatter. Should reproduce by curl as admin and inspect the backend stack-trace.
rca of the issue.demo_seed_leak: IntakeForm card appends a 'source' or 'provenance' field as plain text; seed script writes source='demo_seed'. Either filter out 'demo_seed' in the IntakeTab renderer or exclude that field from the API response serializer.
rca of the issue.workflow_panel_missing_controls: AppointmentWorkflowPanel.jsx currently renders only reschedule fields + Launch encounter + Open intake. Add explicit <CheckInButton> (calls POST /api/appointments/{id}/check-in) and a <RoomSelect> bound to appointment.room_id using the /api/rooms list.
